_comment: AZUS Configuration File — Copy to Resources/config.json and edit paths

_comment_citations: Global citation files — applied to every record in the batch.
To override for a specific record, place related_identifiers.csv
and/or references.csv directly inside that ESID_XXX/ staging directory.
AZUS checks the ESID directory first, then falls back to these paths.
Leave empty string to skip citations entirely.
_comment_reserve_doi: reserve_doi: Reserve a DataCite DOI at draft creation time.
The DOI is assigned immediately but stays pending until the record is published.
Only meaningful for production Zenodo — Sandbox DOIs are not registered
with DataCite. Set to false (default) for test uploads.
